---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Software — Lucia S. Layritz"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <p class="category">Software</p>
  <h1>Software</h1>
  <p style="max-width:600px; color:#444; margin-top:0.8rem;">
    Code to reproduce all my first-author paper is available from my github. Should you need any primary data not hosted on Github or Zenodo or are unable to run any of the scripts, please reach out!

  </p>
</div>

<ul class="repo-list">
  <li>
    <span class="lang">R</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/disturbanceBorealLPJ" target="_blank">disturbanceBorealLPJ</a>
    <span class="repo-desc">Code reproducing Layritz et al., Biogeosciences, 2025. <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/bg-22-3635-2025" target="_blank">doi:10.5194/bg-22-3635-2025</a></span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="lang">R</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/borealRecovery" target="_blank">borealRecovery</a>
    <span class="repo-desc">Code reproducing Layritz et al., JGR Biogeosciences, 2026.</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="lang">R</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/stableEWS_paper" target="_blank">stableEWS_paper</a>
    <span class="repo-desc">Code reproducing Layritz et al., Scientific Reports, 2025. <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-88659-0" target="_blank">doi:10.1038/s41598-025-88659-0</a></span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="lang">Jupyter</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/alphastableTransient" target="_blank">alphastableTransient</a>
    <span class="repo-desc">Code to reproduce "Disturbances and long transients create illusion of stable states".</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="lang">R</span>
    <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/TidyTuesday" target="_blank">TidyTuesday</a>
    <span class="repo-desc">A collection of data visualisations made for the weekly #TidyTuesday challenge in R.</span>
  </li>
</ul>
```
